headline: MTS Health Partners Hires Adam Salamon to Drive Sponsor Relationships
summary: MTS Health Partners, L.P. ("MTS"), a premier investment bank providing strategic advisory services exclusively to the healthcare industry, today announced the appointment of Adam Salamon who will drive Sponsor Relationships. Mr. Salamon joins MTS from Citizens Financial Group, where he worked within their Healthcare Services practice, focusing on covering companies within the industry and financial sponsors.
